item.description:
Release v4.9.1

Changes since v4.9.0

  • feat(agent-tools): enable image passthrough from tool results to LLM
  • feat(aliyun): add 5-minute disk cache for availability checks
  • feat(aliyun): map unsupported Coding Plan models to structured availability
  • feat(availability): HTTP response UI and provider check improvements
  • feat(chat): gate image upload on vision support and refine model row layout
  • feat(download-kit): add bandwidth rate limiting via token bucket algorithm
  • feat(llm-provider-mlx): add Coder/DeepSeek/Microsoft series and fix series selector
  • feat(llm-provider-mlx): auto-unload idle model + delete cached models
  • feat(llm-provider-mlx): record streaming metrics so TPS shows in toolbar
  • feat(llm-provider-mlx): show download speed in model download UI
  • feat(llm-provider): add 5-minute disk cache to all remote LLM providers
  • feat(llm): require explicit providerStatus on each LLM provider
  • feat(lumi-ui): show copied feedback on HTTP response copy button
  • feat(message-renderer): hide message header in brief verbosity mode
  • feat(mlx): support configurable download speed limit for MLX models
  • feat(model-selector): add hover highlight effect to model provider picker
  • feat(model-selector): display friendly model names instead of raw IDs
  • feat(model-selector): distinguish unsupported models in availability UI
  • feat(model-selector): show provider status, availability errors, and usage charts
  • feat(xiaomi): split into TokenPlan + Xiaomi API and show inline API key setup on missing key
